entry.title: Upgrading TRAE Membership Benefits
entry.summary: TRAE launches new token-based pricing with four membership tiers from $3 to $100 monthly, starting February 24, 2026. A 14-day free Pro trial for new users is also available after this transition.

entry.title: Ship AI Software Faster with Vercel
entry.summary: How to build and deploy AI software in a fast way with TRAE and Vercel

entry.title: Best Practices for Agent Skills in TRAE
entry.summary: We've put together a guide on how to create, import, and use Agent Skills in TRAE.

entry.title: Build Backend Seamlessly with Supabase
entry.summary: How TRAE integrates with Supabase.

entry.title: Making AI Coding Safer: How TRAE Protects Your Codebase
entry.summary: We're introducing sandboxing and a multi-layer security system designed to reduce security risk while keeping AI productive.

entry.title: Cue-Pro Technical Deep Dive
entry.summary: A technical deep dive into how we think and build Cue-Pro.

entry.title: Introducing Cue-Pro: a bird's-eye view of your edit predictions
entry.summary: We upgraded Cue with repository-level edit sequences that keep you in flow

entry.title: Quickstart to SOLO Coder
entry.summary: This guide will get you started with using a coding agent like SOLO coder in just a few minutes. We'll show you how to use SOLO Coder for some common development tasks.

entry.title: TRAE SOLO GA Release
entry.summary: TRAE SOLO is the responsive coding agent we built for real-world software development.

entry.title: Scaling Velocity: How Keywords AI Accelerates Development with TRAE SOLO
entry.summary: How a lean team builds production features end-to-end with an AI engineer that “understands, executes, and delivers.”

entry.title: Max Mode in TRAE
entry.summary: We are introducing Max Mode, which is designed for deep coding with larger context windows and more tool calls.

entry.title: Best Practices for TRAE Rules
entry.summary: Stop repeating yourself. In this article we dive into how to set up TRAE Rules that remember your preferences, keep your team aligned, and avoid the common mistakes that make AI ignore your instructions.

entry.title: Challenges and Considerations Behind Trae Cue
entry.summary: Cue is one of the latest and most complex AI development tool features developed by TRAE. We explored the technical challenges, achievements as well as future plans for TRAE Cue.

entry.title: Understanding Trae’s Data Practices
entry.summary: This blog answers some of the most common questions about Trae’s data practices. We’ll explain where data is stored, how it’s used, and what options you have to control its collection and use.

entry.title: Cue Major Update
entry.summary: Trae Cue gets its biggest monthly update with major improvements to model performance and speed.

entry.title: Fresh New Look
entry.summary: TRAE 2.0 marks a full - scale design upgrade for a more focused, intelligent development experience.

entry.title: SOLO is All You Need
entry.summary: The AI that builds complete software.

entry.title: Trae Agent reached #1 on SWE-bench Verified, with Claude 4 - and it's open-sourced.
entry.summary: Trae Agent reached #1 on SWE-bench Verified, with Claude 4 — and it’s open-sourced.

entry.title: Trae Agent 2.0: Smarter Architecture, Tools, and Memory
entry.summary: Trae Agent 2.0 featured a reengineered architecture, unified agent modes, smarter tool orchestration, and long-term memory that brings us closer to building the real AI engineer.

entry.title: @Agent: Rules + Tools to Define Your Future Agents
entry.summary: Deep dive into @Agent and how we built it.

entry.title: Collaborate with Intelligence
entry.summary: Trae unveils major updates: a unified Chat - Builder interface, @Agent system with MCP for multi - agent collaboration, and smarter context handling (#Web, #Doc, Rules). Boost your workflow with AI - driven coding and adaptable agents.

entry.title: Beyond AI Coding: Trae's Vision for Human-AI Collaboration
entry.summary: Trae's vision is to empower seamless collaboration between humans and AI by advancing AI-driven coding, enabling developers to work smarter, faster, and more creatively.

entry.title: More Agentic
entry.summary: We've improved our agent capabilities with better context understanding and greater autonomy.

entry.title: Trae Achieves #1 on SWE-bench Verified with Claude 3.7
entry.summary: Trae achieves 71.0% accuracy on SWE-bench Verified with Claude 3.7, pushing the boundaries of automated issue resolving. Not just fast. Not just big. But deeply aligned with the nature of engineering.

entry.title: Mastering Context in Trae
entry.summary: We've put together this guide that shows you how to make smart use of context in Trae to collaborate seamlessly with your AI partner.

entry.title: TRAE 2025 Unwrapped
entry.summary: This is your year in review. Let's look back at what we created together.
